prestazioni: Engine swap to a Fiat/Lancia 2.0L 16V turbocharged *831A5.000* (from Lancia Delta Integrale Evoluzione) with forged internals (Wiseco 86mm pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 10455 muffler, and a Motec M150 ECU for standalone management with launch control and anti-lag strategies.

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Quaife ATB differential (QDF7Z) for the Ritmo’s unique transaxle layout, uprated CV joints from GKN Driveline, and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (620mm) with a lightweight flywheel (12.5kg) to handle the increased torque.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Ritmo’s MacPherson strut front and trailing arm rear), polybushings from SuperPro (SPF1001K), and a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm) paired with a custom rear sway bar (22mm) to eliminate body roll. Braking upgraded to Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (08.9904.70) with 330mm rotors up front and 2-piston calipers (08.5360.10) with 280mm rotors at the rear, using Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a *Rocket Bunny Ritmo-specific kit* (RB-FIAT01) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all finished in a matte *Abarth Rosso* (Pantone 18-1655 TCX) with hand-painted *Abarth Scorpion* side graphics in gloss black.

OMP carbon fiber racing seats (OMP689) upholstered in Alcantara with *Abarth Rosso* stitching, paired with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm) wrapped in perforated leather and a custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) from Custom Cages UK, painted in satin black.

Lightweight 16-inch OZ Racing Ultraleggera wheels (7.5J ET25 front, 8.5J ET20 rear) in gold finish, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (205/45 R16 front, 225/45 R16 rear). Full LED lighting conversion with LUX H8 bulbs, a custom carbon fiber hood with functional NACA ducts, and a rear wing from a *Fiat 131 Abarth* (restored and repurposed) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals.
